utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh God , I hate my job , I hate it , I hate my job , I hate it .

utterances.text: I know honey , I am sorry .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , I wanna quit , but then I think I should stick it out , then I think why would such a person stay in such a demeaning job , just because it is remotely related to the field they are interested in .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Gee , I do not know Rach . Order up ! ! I got a Yentel soup , a James Beans , and a Howdy hold the Dowdy !

emotion_cause.span: 3_I think why would such a person stay in such a demeaning job , just because it is remotely related to the field they are interested in .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh honey , come on , I am sorry , I did not ...

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I do not mind paying my dues , you know , its just how much am I gonna learn about fashion by walking Mira , the arthritic seamstress , to the bathroom .

emotion_cause.span: 6_walking Mira , the arthritic seamstress , to the bathroom

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hi ! Is my misery amusing to you ?

utterances.speaker: Guy
utterances.text: I am sorry , I wa , I wa , I was just ah ...

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: It is not funny , this is actually my job .

emotion_cause.span: 9_It is not funny , this is actually my job .

utterances.speaker: Guy
utterances.text: Oh believe me , I ... I ... I have been there . I had to sort mannequin heads at that Mannequins Plus .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh well then , so I am just going to go back to talking to my friend here .

emotion_cause.span: 11_I am just going to go back to talking to my friend here .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: And you can go back to enjoying your little hamburger .
